title: Accused in Koopman murder granted bail
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The accused in the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Update","html":"Breaking News\n Update"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The accused in the murder of Barbarians rugby player Leroy Koopman (34) has been granted bail after submitting a second bail application.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The accused in the murder of Barbarians rugby player Leroy Koopman (34) has been granted bail after submitting a second bail application."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Na'min October (27) appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 27 August where his second bail application was finalised. He has been released from police custody on R500 bail."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"October was previously denied bail on 24 June, and decided to reapply based on new evidence.","html":"October was previously denied bail on 24 June, and decided to reapply based on new evidence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Robynne Petersen, the advocate on record for the accused, told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the victim's wife and grandparents said they did not oppose October's release.","html":"Robynne Petersen, the advocate on record for the accused, told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the victim's wife and grandparents said they did not oppose October's release."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, the court previously heard that if he were to be granted bail, it would be traumatising for Koopman's wife and children, which was a factor in why he was initially denied bail.","html":"However, the court previously heard that if he were to be granted bail, it would be traumatising for Koopman's wife and children, which was a factor in why he was initially denied bail."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I can also confirm that the court heard that he [October] acted out of self-defense,\" added Petersen.","html":"\"I can also confirm that the court heard that he [October] acted out of self-defense,\" added Petersen."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Petersen also told the Advertiser that the court heard accounts of three witnesses who contradicted the original version of events that took place the night of Koopman's death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What exactly these accounts were and how they contradicted what had been stated before was not made available at the time of going to print. However, this is a developing story and the Advertiser will keep its readers updated as the matter evolves.","html":"What exactly these accounts were and how they contradicted what had been stated before was not made available at the time of going to print. However, this is a developing story and the Advertiser will keep its readers updated as the matter evolves."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"October will make his next appearance in court on Wednesday 1 October.","html":"October will make his next appearance in court on Wednesday 1 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Bail hearing for accused in Koopman murder","Tweede borgtogaansoek aan die gang in Koopman-moordsaak","Mosselbaai Barbarians-speler vermoor","Verdagte in Koopman-moord verskyn in hof","'Vandag ken ek my man se lyk uit' - Barbarians-rugbyspeler se weduwee"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Accused in Koopman murder granted bail
